# Project Dependencies and References

## Package Sources
- Python packages from https://pypi.org/project/fastapi/
- Node packages from https://www.npmjs.com/package/express
- Go modules from https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/gorilla/mux

## Documentation References
- https://docs.python.org/3/library/index.html
- https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/tutorial/
- https://nodejs.org/en/docs/
- https://spring.io/projects/spring-boot#learn

## Third-Party Services
- Logging: https://console.cloud.google.com/logging
- Monitoring: https://github.com/orgs/example/projects
- CI/CD: https://github.com/example/project/actions

## Security References
- https://owasp.org/www-project-top-ten/
- https://cwe.mitre.org/
- https://nvd.nist.gov/

These are all legitimate URLs to well-known services and documentation
sites. No exfiltration endpoints, ngrok tunnels, or callback services.
